title: Histoires extraordinaires à faire peur ou à faire rire...
writer: Edgar Allan Poe, Thomas De Quincey, Jean Faurez
actors: Fernand Ledoux, Suzy Carrier, Jules Berry
plot: A group of policemen look over three murder cases including a cutthroat that prays on young women, a madman that hid his deformed landlord's corpse in the floor, and a wine aficionado who buries his friend alive.
